sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75948" key="ou)ranopeth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐρᾰνο-πετής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n75948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fallen from heaven</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δαίμονες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.83</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> of, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">870c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
